message:
fix(tests): simplify saveMissions error test to avoid DOMException prototype issues (#9327)

Replace the quota-exceeded DOMException test (which hit prototype
getter limitations in jsdom) with a simpler outer-catch test using
a plain Error — verifies saveMissions never throws on any storage
failure.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
